payload.description: Employee benefit available to all employees and their family members, offering short-term confidential counseling and referrals for personal assistance including alcohol/substance abuse.

evidence_refs.source_quote: LIRR Employee Assistance Program (EAP) – (347) 494 - 6285

EAP is an employee benefit available to all employees and their family members. EAP's role is to offer professional assistance in the form of short-term confidential counseling and referrals for a wide range of personal assistance, including alcohol/substance abuse.
